manifest.name: Tome

name: Tome

releases.author: TsuKKi-is-dead
releases.description:
## Tome 1.0.3— Updated release

Tome is an Obsidian plugin for building a visual, Markdown-native book library. Search by title or ISBN across Google Books, Open Library, and OpenAlex, automatically download and cache covers locally, and track reading status, ratings, and progress — all stored as plain frontmatter so it works seamlessly with Dataview and Obsidian Bases.

### Features
- Multi-provider search with configurable provider order and automatic fallback
- Local cover image caching for offline-stable notes
- Fully customizable note templates (frontmatter + body)
- Built-in gallery view, plus native support for Obsidian Bases Card view
- Optional Google Books API key and OpenAlex contact email to raise rate limits
- Retry-with-backoff handling for provider rate limits

### Installation
Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` from this release and place them in `<your-vault>/.obsidian/plugins/tome/`. Then enable Tome under Settings → Community plugins.

See the [README](https://github.com/TsuKKi-is-dead/Tome#readme) for full setup instructions.
releases.name: Tome 1.0.3— Updated release
